name: @spellguard/gateway
description: HTTP↔SLIM gateway for Spellguard. The single Workers-facing entry point for the slim profile: receives HTTP from agents, forwards via SLIM to the Verifier; receives SLIM from the Verifier, POSTs HTTP to agents' /_spellguard/receive endpoints. Pure translation — no policy, no dir lookups, no audit. The Verifier owns those concerns and pushes agent registry updates to the gateway via SLIM control messages.
